2605.30152.title: Do Proactive Agents Really Need an LLM to Decide When to Wake and What to Anchor?
2605.30152.paper_summary: Proactive agents read user activity as text and call an LLM on every event to decide whether to act. But user activity is not natively text: it is a structured event stream of (actor, verb, object, timestamp) tuples that the operating system already maintains in graph form. Rendering the structure as text and asking an LLM to recover it is a round-trip the system never had to take. We treat the always-on signal as graph updates rather than text and use a small temporal-graph-learning (TGL) model as the encoder: one forward pass yields a per-event trigger probability and a per-entity routing score, and only the downstream agent (turning a small structured handoff into a fluent user-facing sentence) is an LLM call, invoked only when the trigger fires. TGL improves F1 on each of 14 backbones (mean +16.7, up to +46.0); in trigger-architecture comparisons, one TGL checkpoint gives the strongest trigger AUCs and the most stable deployed threshold. It runs at 11.13 ms per event on a GPU server and 13.99 ms on a consumer laptop, approximately 4--7x and 12--83x faster than every single-forward LLM-as-trigger configuration tested in each regime, with an approximately 220 MiB BF16 resident footprint deployable on-device alongside the privacy-sensitive activity stream it consumes.
2605.30152.paper_summary_zh: 主動代理將用戶活動視為文本，並在每個事件上調用LLM以決定是否採取行動。<lb/>但用戶活動本身並不是文本：它是一個結構化的事件流，由（行為者、動詞、對象、時間戳）元組組成，操作系統已經以圖形形式維護這些元組。<lb/>將結構呈現為文本並要求LLM恢復它是一個系統從未必須進行的往返過程。<lb/>我們將始終在線信號視為圖形更新，而不是文本，並使用一個小型的時間圖學習（TGL）模型作為編碼器：一次前向傳遞產生每個事件的觸發概率和每個實體的路由分數，只有下游代理（將小型結構化交接轉換為流暢的用戶面向句子）才是LLM調用，僅在觸發器觸發時調用。<lb/>TGL在14個骨幹上提高了F1（平均+16.7，最高達+46.0）；在觸發架構比較中，單個TGL檢查點提供了最強的觸發AUC和最穩定的部署閾值。<lb/>它在GPU伺服器上每個事件運行時間為11.13毫秒，在消費者筆記本電腦上為13.99毫秒，速度約為每個測試範疇中每個單一前向LLM作為觸發配置的4至7倍和12至83倍，並具有約220 MiB的BF16常駐佔用，能夠在設備上部署，與其消耗的隱私敏感活動流一起使用。
2605.30152.author: Xiaoze Liu et.al.
2605.30152.authors: Xiaoze Liu, Ruowang Zhang, Amir H. Abdi, Michel Galley, Zhikai Chen, Siheng Xiong, Xiaoqian Wang, Jing Gao
